# model.validate_generator { #tslai.model.validate_generator }

```python
tslai.model.validate_generator(Q, atol=1e-09)
```

Check that ``Q`` is a valid CTMC generator.

Validates that ``Q`` is square, its rows sum to zero, and its off-diagonal
rates are non-negative.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Candidate ``(K, K)`` generator matrix.

<code>[**atol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-09]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Absolute tolerance for the row-sum and non-negativity checks.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``Q`` as a float array (unchanged), once validated.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[ValueError](`ValueError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If ``Q`` is not square, its rows do not sum to zero, or any off-diagonal rate is negative.
